character.name:
Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A Templar-inspired armored protector in
  ▎  full plate mail with a white tabard over the chestplate. Kite shield slung on arm, longsword sheathed at
  ▎ hip. Helm tucked under arm or worn with visor up, revealing noble weathered features. Gold filigree trim,
  ▎ Arthurian cross motif on shield. Stoic, upright posture. Palette: gold #C9A961, deep blue #2B4C6F, white
  ▎ #F5F5F5. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
